top_signals.title: Oil Gains, US Stock Futures Drop on Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil gained and US equity-index futures slipped after the US said it struck Iran for a second straight day, stoking fears the conflict could disrupt shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China's rare missile test will push wary Asia-Pacific countries to close ranks, analysts say
top_signals.summary: China's rare launch of a ballistic missile launch into the Pacific will push regional powers to deepen their defense ties.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore's Temasek boosts China exposure by $7.7 billion, biggest rise in five years, in AI-driven pivot
top_signals.summary: Temasek is repositioning its China portfolio toward AI-related hardware and infrastructure, robotics, biotech, energy transition.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
